creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
On Thu, 19 Jul 2012 20:11:03 GMT
cs@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] games/duckmaze: A game about a duck that is in a maze
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: cs
> State-Changed-When: Thu Jul 19 20:10:38 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Why did you select MASTER_SITE_LOCAL? Is there no public repository available?
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=168114

This Game is a SVN Version

http://wiki.freebsd.org/EitanAdler/ports-svn

http://sourceforge.net/apps/trac/sourceforge/wiki/Subversion



On this site is only 0.3 SVN version (Live Version)

http://duckmaze.sourceforge.net/

and old 0.2 on

http://sourceforge.net/projects/duckmaze/files/duckmaze/

Look please Makefile I must use

maint-gen-distfile:

and look mine Description on PR.

Sorry i can't put somewhere on Internet duckmaze-0.3r34.tar.gz, and have used

MASTER_SITES=   ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}

to local store on FreeBSD Mirror, sorry for this.

Also i think this is the only Way to use SVN Version with FreeBSD.
